endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments
endpoints.description: List Blueprint assignments within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/{assignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real assignmentname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/{assignmentName}
endpoints.description: Create or update a Blueprint assignment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real assignmentname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blueprint/blueprintAssignments/{assignmentName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{ASSIGNMENTNAME}} with a real assignmentname.
